---
title: "Typst Margin Layout Foundation Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        - ['@preview/marginalia:0\.3\.1', 'marginalia\.setup\.with\(']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

::: {.column-margin}
This triggers margin layout.
:::

Main content here.
